sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented. Tier 3 empirical data only.

special_mechanics.name: Ant Movement Control
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a single ant (indicated by yellow color) in top-down perspective. Direct control allows the ant to move through yard and underground tunnels. Movement is restricted by colony-based pathfinding and pheromone trails.

special_mechanics.name: Pheromone Trail System
special_mechanics.description: Yellow ant leaves pheromone trails to destinations (food, enemy colonies). Other ants follow these trails. Rain hazard washes away pheromone trails.

special_mechanics.name: Gravity and Environmental Hazards
special_mechanics.description: Game includes rain hazard that floods ant nests and washes away pheromone trails. No explicit gravity physics documented.

tier_notes: Tier 3 data: SimAnt is a life simulation game, not a platformer or action game. Movement physics parameters are not applicable to this genre. The game focuses on colony-level simulation mechanics, ant behavior pathfinding, and strategic gameplay rather than precise character physics. No sub-pixel systems, gravity constants, or jump mechanics are documented. Wikipedia source provides gameplay overview but no technical physics parameters.
